extension.news: 2026.07.20 - Harden audio downloads: atomic .part handoff, validate status/size/magic bytes, skip failed album tracks, clear download lock on failure; keep-download cache uses album storage keys. 2026.07.19 - Flat Artist - Album folders escape embedded separators so distinct albums no longer collide; legacy flat and album-only folders still resolve with ID3 checks. 2026.07.18 - ID3 tag check prevents wrong artist when two albums share a title. 2026.07.17 - Single-track album downloads from collab/soundtrack albums use the same album folder as full-album download. See the changelog. Enjoy!
